title: Night
color: Normal in SuperNight; D-Log M for manual grading
iso: 100–1600 starting limit; raise only when required
wb: 3200–4500 K or Auto under mixed city light
nr: 0 in SuperNight; -2 for manual denoise workflow
mistakes: Expecting clean footage in near darkness
tips: Option A: SuperNight for delivery speed. Option B: standard video, faster shutter and external denoise for control.
